title: theka grandis
intro: Theka grandis, also known as the 'Indian Periwinkle', is a perennial plant native to the tropical forests of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of cancer cells and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Theka grandis include its potential to improve heart health, manage diabetes, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Theka grandis can be found in the form of capsules, tablets, or teas, and are often used to support cardiovascular and neurological health.
